# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_afdorigin (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of the origin that is unique within the AFD Profile.
- `origin_group_name` (String) Name of the origin group which is unique within the profile.
- `profile_name` (String) Name of the AFD Profile.
- `resource_group` (String) Name of a resource group where the AFD Origin exists or will be created.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `azure_origin` (String) Resource reference to the AFD origin resource.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enabled_state` (String) Whether to enable health probes to be made against backends defined under backend pools. Health probes can only be disabled if there is a single enabled backend in single enabled backend pool.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `host_name` (String) The address of the origin. Domain names, IPv4 addresses, and IPv6 addresses are supported. This should be unique across all origins in an endpoint.
- `http_port` (Number) The value of the HTTP port. Must be between 1 and 65535.
- `https_port` (Number) The value of the HTTPS port. Must be between 1 and 65535.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `origin_host_header` (String) The host header value sent to the origin with each request. If you leave this blank, the request hostname determines this value. Azure Front Door origins, such as Web Apps, Blob Storage, and Cloud Services require this host header value to match the origin hostname by default. This overrides the host header defined at the AFD Endpoint.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `priority` (Number) Priority of origin in given origin group for load balancing. Higher priorities will not be used for load balancing if any lower priority origin is healthy. Must be between 1 and 5.
- `shared_private_link_resource` (String) The properties of the private link resource for private origin.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Assert the state of the AFD Profile. Use `present` to create or update an AFD profile and `absent` to delete it.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `weight` (Number) Weight of the origin in given origin group for load balancing. Must be between 1 and 1000.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
